name: Pallanguzhi
author: AGP
description: Pallanguzhi (Pallankuzhi), the traditional South Indian / Tamil two-row mancala. Two rows of seven pits, 84 seeds (6 per pit). Sow counterclockwise with lap/relay sowing; capture a pit the instant it reaches four seeds ('kashi'/cow), and when your last seed lands before an empty pit your turn ends and you take the seeds in the pit beyond it. Most seeds wins. Standard single-round 'cow' variant; see rules for the documented choices.
